markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.503 — Disposal of Records

Unless otherwise required by law, and subject to Chapter 441 (Libraries and Archives) , Government Code, the department may dispose of or destroy a record that the department determines is not required for the performance of the department’s duties and functions.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
